drl:
rule "R0"
salience 2
no-loop
when
    ( not T2() )
    or
    ( not T2() )
then
    insertLogical(new T2("beta", -1.0));
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    ( T0(f0 == true, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0) and T1($b1_1_0 : f2, $b1_1_1 : f2) )
    or
    ( T0(f0 == true, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f0) and T1($b1_1_0 : f2, $b1_1_1 : f2) )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    not T2()
then
    insertLogical(new T2("a", -0.5));
end
rule "R3"
salience -4
when
    (or (and T0(f0 == true, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0) $p3_1 : T1($b3_1_0 : f2, $b3_1_1 : f2)) (and T0(f0 == true, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0) $p3_1 : T1($b3_1_0 : f2, $b3_1_1 : f2)))
then
    insertLogical(new T2("b", $p3_1.getF1()));
end
rule "R4"
when
    T2(f0 in ("b", ""), $b4_0_0 : f0)
    $p4_1 : T0($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0)
    accumulate( T0(f0 == false, f0 == $b4_1_0); $a4_2 : count() )
then
    delete($p4_1);
end
rule "R5"
when
    ( T2(f1 != 2.5, f1 <= 2.5 || f1 in (-1000000007, 1.5) || !(f1 > 11)) )
    or
    ( T2(f0 matches "ab", f1 != 5.5) )
then
end
